about.body_1: This hackathon decision-support prototype is built for public electricity awareness. It combines RTE/ODRE electricity observations, EcoWatt context, weather features, and transparent fallbacks to explain demand, generation, exchange, and pressure separately.
about.body_2: Limitations: this is not an RTE operational forecast, tariff signal, dispatch tool, or verified carbon accounting method. Historical sample data is separated from live operational context.
about.title: About the project

carbon.detail: Displayed separately; not used in official EcoWatt or modelled balance status.
carbon.label: Carbon context

drivers.demand_detail: France is using {demand}; usual for this context is {usual}.

generation_detail.modelled: Generation and exchange context is {margin} versus demand. {flow}
generation_detail.unavailable: Generation and exchange context is unavailable.

forecast.detail: {status}. Forecast route: {source}. This context is modelled and is not an official warning.
forecast.label: Selected-hour forecast context
forecast.section_copy: Pick an hour to update the selected-hour forecast context.
forecast.title: {timestamp}: {demand}
forecast.unavailable_body: No forecast point is available for the selected hour.

generation_mix.source: RTE eCO2mix and typed current-state API
generation_mix.viz_detail: Major sources are labelled directly. Small sources are grouped into Other when the chart would become cluttered.

main_driver.demand: The clearest driver is demand compared with usual.
main_driver.no_single_driver: No single driver is dominant from the available sources.
main_driver.residual_load: Demand left after wind and solar is the main modelled driver.
main_driver.unavailability: Announced generation unavailability is the main modelled driver.

near_term.falling: Falling over the next few hours ({delta})
near_term.rising: Rising over the next few hours ({delta})
near_term.steady: Broadly steady over the next few hours

delayed_source_data.body: The current-state API marks the latest source record as delayed.
delayed_source_data.title: Delayed source data

optional_source_unavailable.body: One or more optional source fields are unavailable.
optional_source_unavailable.title: Optional source unavailable

stale_data.body: The latest typed contract marks this data as stale.
stale_data.title: Stale data

typed_twin_contract_unavailable.body: The page is using the legacy public context while the typed response is unavailable.
typed_twin_contract_unavailable.title: Typed twin contract unavailable

using_last_known_good.body: Live refresh did not provide a fresh complete source bundle.
using_last_known_good.title: Using last-known-good data

official.detail_unavailable: No official EcoWatt signal is available.
official.label: Official signal

regions.connected_grid_note: Regional context is not an independent shortage warning. Regional values are connected-grid context only; local generation is not a measure of electricity available only inside the region, and low local generation does not indicate a regional electricity shortage.
regions.flow_detail: Imports and exports are physical flow context when available.
regions.generation_detail: Generation measured in the region, within the connected French grid.
regions.note_unavailable: Regional context is not an independent shortage warning; unavailable fields stay labelled unavailable.
regions.section_copy: Map color compares each region with its usual demand for a comparable context. Grey regions are unavailable, not zero.
regions.selector_help: Select a region to update the regional contribution panel.

states.energy_unavailable_body: The public dashboard could not load current electricity context.

local_generation.definition: Electricity generated in the selected region; the region remains part of the connected French grid.
local_generation.label: local generation

usual_demand.definition: A comparable-history baseline for the same season, day type, and local hour.
usual_demand.label: usual demand

unavailable_reasons.demand_anomaly_missing: Demand anomaly is unavailable because observed or usual demand is missing.
unavailable_reasons.difference_missing: Difference versus usual is unavailable because demand or baseline is missing.
unavailable_reasons.no_regional_demand_record: No regional demand record is available for this region.
unavailable_reasons.no_regional_record: No regional record is available for {region}.
unavailable_reasons.usual_demand_geography: Usual-demand baseline is unavailable for this geography.

weather.unavailable_detail: Weather context is unavailable for this snapshot.
